text: As I pass through these bright, modern halls and push open a glass door into the "R+D" space, I feel an immediate sense of curiosity and contemplation. The environment is purposefully designed to inspire thought about progress and possibility. The exhibits and text—discussing how we connect with intelligence and technology—provoke a gentle tension within me between excitement for the future and wonder about human meaning in an evolving world. I feel both invigorated and slightly awed to be here, as if standing at the crossroads of innovation and philosophy.
